Instruction: Walk forward across the light-colored tiled floor and proceed through the glass double doors ahead. Upon entering the wider, darker corridor with the polished black and grey striped floor, continue straight. Keep the solid grey wall on your left and the glass railing on your right. Walk past the series of glass-walled rooms on your right, including one with a red lower section and another with a prominent red and white sign. Continue straight past a tall stack of blue plastic crates on your right. Just after the crates, stop in front of the glass door on your right that opens into a brightly lit shop with stocked shelves and a small blue sign above the entrance. This is your destination.
